series_metadata.series_description: File contains Customer Inquiry Forms and non-winning tickets. Customer inquiries are filed by customers that posses a ticket that appears to be a winner but will not validate as a winner on the Lottery's computer system. The file includes the Lottery's Internal Control System results report identifying the reason why the ticket will not validate; cashed, stolen, mutilated, altered, etc. The file may also contain interoffice communications pertaining to the inquiry.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy in operating area Auditor of State issues final audit report. Scan hard copy ; Electronic: digital copy seven (7) years from payment date
